title: Raccoon Removal in Floral Park, Long Island | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Floral Park, Long Island. Safe, humane removal starting at $900. Licensed experts serving Floral Park homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Floral Park's beautiful tree-lined streets and charming residential neighborhoods provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional, humane raccoon removal services throughout Floral Park, protecting your property from these intelligent and potentially destructive wildlife intruders. Our experienced technicians provide comprehensive solutions ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of your raccoon problem.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Floral Park homeowners for years with prompt, effective raccoon removal that prioritizes both safety and humane practices. Our licensed wildlife specialists understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties and provide guaranteed results with full exclusion services to prevent future intrusions.
localContext: Floral Park's proximity to both residential gardens and wooded areas near Belmont Park creates perfect conditions for raccoon activity, especially in the historic homes around Floral Park Village and near the Floral Park Memorial School area. The mix of vintage Tudor and Colonial-style homes with accessible attics and chimneys makes professional wildlife exclusion particularly important for property owners throughout the community.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Floral Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the infestation (attic, chimney, crawl space), extent of damage, and whether babies are present. A thorough inspection allows us to provide an accurate quote for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Floral Park neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Floral Park due to the abundance of mature trees, accessible food sources, and older homes with potential entry points. They're frequently found in attics and chimneys, especially during spring breeding season and fall when they seek warm shelter for winter.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State wildlife regulations and uses only humane, legal removal methods. We safely trap and relocate raccoons when appropriate, and we never use harmful chemicals or inhumane practices. Our methods comply with all local Floral Park and Nassau County ordinances.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Floral Park residents in most cases. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, with trapping, removal, cleanup, and exclusion work completed efficiently. We understand the urgency of wildlife intrusions and prioritize rapid response for our Floral Park customers.
